summary: Vedolizumab has very low or undetectable levels in breast milk due to its large size and degradation in the gut; therefore, therapeutic levels—even though some biological activity may occur—cannot realistically be achieved in infants. Thus, it is incorrect to state that therapeutic levels can be found in maternal breast milk.

Thus, it is incorrect to state that therapeutic levels can be found in maternal breast milk.. Answer choice: B
